rationale: Gov't Code §2306.054 governs special advisory councils for the housing department. It has no bearing on Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote:
Sec. 2306.054. SPECIAL ADVISORY COUNCILS. (a) The governor or director may appoint special advisory councils to:
(1) assist the department in reviewing basic policy; or
(2) offer advice on technical aspects of certain programs.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed change; no conflict exists.
